market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

title_variants: North Manchester Apt – 45% Below Market Rate
Affordable North Manchester Home for 4 – 65% Booked
analysis.rewritten_desc: Welcome to your modern 1‑bedroom apartment in North Manchester, perfect for families or groups of up to four guests. This entire home offers a comfortable bedroom with a queen‑size bed, a bright living area with a sofa and dining table, a fully equipped kitchen, and a clean bathroom. Hosted by Andrew, a new host who’s eager to provide a seamless stay, the property boasts a solid 4.77 rating from 44 reviews. At just £85.60 per night, it’s priced 45% below the city’s median nightly rate of £154.60, yet it already enjoys a strong 65.2% occupancy for the next 90 days, leaving only 31 open nights. While the listing doesn’t currently highlight specific amenities, guests can expect the basics for a pleasant stay. The location in North Manchester offers easy access to local shops, restaurants, and public transport, making it a convenient base for exploring the city. Book now to experience comfort, value, and a great host who’s committed to making your visit memorable.
top_amenity_gaps: Dedicated parking or free on‑street parking information
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a bright, wide‑angle shot of the living area as the cover photo—it showcases the main gathering space and immediately conveys the apartment’s size and style.
key_diagnosis: Raise the nightly rate from £85.6 to around £100 (≈+17%) – you’re 45% below the market median yet already have 65.2% occupancy, so a modest increase can boost revenue without sacrificing bookings.
Add high‑value amenities such as a balcony or patio, guaranteed parking, and a TV with streaming services – these are the top gaps and can justify a higher price point.
Upload at least 8 high‑resolution photos covering the living room, bedroom, kitchen, bathroom, and any view; set the living‑room shot as the cover to improve visual appeal and click‑through rates.
analysis.outreach_hook: At £85.6 per night you’re charging 45% less than the city median while already enjoying a 65.2% booking rate – a simple rate tweak could unlock significant extra revenue.
